---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to Codexdian
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Or Opportunity

What workflow is blocked, confusing, or slower than it should be?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the feature you want.

## Why It Matters

Explain the user value or workflow impact.

## Extra Context

Mockups, screenshots, or examples from other tools are welcome.
